    • Prefiltering cell type triads using CLQ permutation test

Jaccard similarity index heatmap

Source: R/SCOPE_Utilities_figures.R
draw_htmap_jaccard_index.Rd

ComplexHeatmap and grid packages are required for the function.

Usage

draw_htmap_jaccard_index(jaccard_mat, cl, num_clusters)

Arguments

jaccard_mat

A numeric matrix containing the Jaccard similarity indices between all pairs of CTNs. Output of the jaccard_dist_hclust() function.

cl

An object of class "hclust" which describes the tree produced by the clustering process. Output of the jaccard_dist_hclust() function.

num_clusters

An integer specifying the target number of clusters to slice or highlight on the heatmap.

Value

A ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap object.

Details

Heatmap visualization of the Jaccard similarity indices between all pairs of cell-type triad Niches (CTNs) using an ordered heatmap based on hierarchical clustering.

On this page
